message:
fix(web): remove standalone pages that override lesson routing

The standalone pages at /learn/agent-commands and /learn/ntm-palette
were overriding the dynamic [slug] route, preventing users from getting
the proper lesson navigation (Previous/Complete/Next buttons).

Both slugs are defined in LESSONS array and have proper lesson components:
- agent-commands → AgentsLoginLesson (lesson #6)
- ntm-palette → NtmPaletteLesson (lesson #8)

By removing the standalone page.tsx files, Next.js will now route
these paths through the lesson system which provides:
- Mobile navigation bar with Previous/Complete/Next buttons
- Lesson completion tracking
- Consistent lesson UI/UX

Fixes: User report that agent-commands page had "no way to proceed"

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
